name: Applesauce Spice Cake or Gingerbread
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 cups flour (I use whole wheat pastry flour)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the molasses and applesauce in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining ingredients: cinnamon, cloves, baking powder, baking soda, flour, and optional ginger.
3. Stir the dry ingredients into the liquid mixture until well combined. If the batter seems very dry, add a little more applesauce or water to reach the desired consistency.
4. Pour the batter into an 8x8-inch nonstick pan or a pan sprayed with cooking spray.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 30-45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
The optional ginger makes an acceptable gingerbread. For a chocolate cake alternative, add 3-4 tablespoons of cocoa powder (or carob) to the batter and adjust sweetness as needed.
